task_completion.description: Open Oracle Analytics Desktop and load the order lines dataset
task_completion.visual_evidence: Oracle Analytics Desktop interface is visible with a dataset loaded, showing columns such as 'Customer Name' and 'Order ID' in the data panel.

task_completion.description: Create a calculated column named 'Orders Per Customer'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A calculation dialog or the data panel shows a new custom calculation explicitly named 'Orders Per Customer' that counts distinct Order IDs.

task_completion.description: Treat 'Orders Per Customer' as an attribute
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Orders Per Customer' column in the data panel displays an attribute icon (typically an 'A' or text symbol) instead of a measure/number icon, or the properties panel shows 'Treat As' set to 'Attribute'.

task_completion.description: Visualize the distribution of customers by order frequency using a bar chart
task_completion.visual_evidence: A bar chart visualization is rendered on the main canvas, using 'Orders Per Customer' on one axis to show the distribution/count of customers.
The top title bar of the Oracle Analytics window displays 'Customer_Frequency_Dist', or a save dialog is visible confirming this exact filename.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Oracle Analytics Desktop application interface being clicked and navigated, rather than terminal commands or scripts generating a file.

integrity.description: The bar chart is genuinely rendered within the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart appears inside the Oracle Analytics canvas workspace with the application's native UI elements (toolbars, data panels) visible, not as a standalone image in an image viewer.

integrity.description: The agent used the calculation editor rather than renaming an existing column
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Add Calculation' or 'Edit Calculation' window is visible at some point, showing a formula being applied to create 'Orders Per Customer'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected filename for the saved workbook is 'Customer_Frequency_Dist.dva'. The calculation must be named 'Orders Per Customer'. The visualization type must be a bar chart.
